findings.title: Access sampling decision logic is duplicated across two entrypoints
findings.impact: ShouldRecordAccessType repeats the same snapshot, REQUEST_OUT, full-rate, request-sampled-in, zero-rate, trace-hash, and event-sampling ladder implemented just above in ShouldRecordAccess. The two paths are used by different access-recording call sites, so future changes to access sampling semantics can easily update one path and leave the other with divergent behavior.
findings.fix: Extract the common access decision into one helper that accepts AccessKeyType and the loaded snapshot, then have ShouldRecordAccess only map AccessRecorderKey to AccessKeyType before delegating.
